title: South Africa Yellow Pages Scraper Input

keyword.title: Search Query (What)
keyword.description: The specific business category or name (e.g., 'plumber', 'mining', 'attorney').

location.title: Location (Where)
location.description: City or province in South Africa (e.g., 'Johannesburg', 'Cape Town', 'Durban').

maxLeads.title: Maximum Leads
maxLeads.description: Maximum number of South African business leads to extract.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Apify Residential Proxy (South Africa targeted) is highly required.
